events.description: The sun is setting over the endless ocean, painting the sky in brilliant oranges and purples. The Sea Serpent rocks gently on the waves, her black sails billowing in the evening breeze. You stand on the main deck with your friends Jack and Marina, and Captain Morgan at the helm. The old map lies spread on a barrel - your ticket to fortune and glory. Adventure awaits, and the sea is calling.

events.dialouge: This map looks incredible! Captain, what do you make of these markings?

Aye, Henry... these aren't the markings of any chart I've seen in a common port. They look like the 'Whispering Currents' scripts. I saw similar ink on a ghost-ship's log back in the Azure Reach, thirty years ago. This map doesn't just show a path; it hides a secret.
events.action_description: Steps closer to the table, tracing the ink with a weathered, calloused finger while squinting through a monocle.

events.dialouge: That's the spirit! While Marina's doing the heavy lifting with the stars, I'll be getting the crew in fighting shape. If there's a secret guarding that loot, it'll find out real quick that my steel is sharper than the Captain's wit!
events.action_description: crosses his arms over his chest and leans back against the cabin wall with a smug grin

events.dialouge: Heavy lifting, is it? Just make sure you can keep up once I've found the way, Jack! I'll have our course plotted and the wind in our favor before you've even finished sharpening that blade. Now, out of the way—I've got a secret to uncover!
events.action_description: Grabs the map from the table and turns on her heel, heading toward the navigation desk.
